title: collinsia torreyi var. wrightii
intro: Collinsia torreyi var. wrightii, also known as Wright's blue-eyed Mary, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as cramps, fever, and sore throats. The health benefits of Collinsia torreyi var. wrightii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote relaxation, making it a valuable herb for stress relief and overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Collinsia torreyi var. wrightii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
